journal_entry.reason: Deposit received for future moving services creates a liability (unearned revenue) until services are performed

output.liability_increase_reason: Deposit received of $5,000 creates unearned revenue liability because the moving services have not yet been performed
output.equity_increase_reason: No equity transactions; this is a customer deposit, not owner investment
output.revenue_increase_reason: No revenue recognized yet because services will be performed in one month (not yet earned/delivered/performed)
output.asset_decrease_reason: No assets decrease; cash is received (debit side), not paid out
output.dividend_decrease_reason: No dividend or drawing transactions involved
output.expense_decrease_reason: No expense reversals or reductions involved

output.asset_increase_reason: Cash (chequing account) increases by $5,000 from the deposit received via bank transfer. This is one asset increase line.
output.dividend_increase_reason: No owner withdrawals or dividends are involved in this transaction.
output.expense_increase_reason: No expenses are incurred. The deposit received creates a liability (unearned revenue), not an expense. The moving services have not yet been performed.
output.liability_decrease_reason: No liabilities are being paid down or extinguished. Instead, a new liability (unearned revenue/deposit) is being created.
output.equity_decrease_reason: No equity accounts are being reduced. No treasury stock purchases, no equity distributions beyond dividends.
output.revenue_decrease_reason: No revenue is being reversed or reduced. The services have not yet been performed, so no revenue is recognized. The deposit creates a liability, not revenue.

output_tax_specialist.reasoning: Moving services are taxable supplies, but the transaction text does not mention any tax. The text only states the contract price of $17,700 and deposit of $5,000 received, with no reference to tax, HST, or any tax rate.
